response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive senior-level experience in software development, leadership, and architecture, with a strong focus on open-source technologies and interdisciplinary team mentorship. His background includes leading projects in IT consulting and software development, with notable achievements in system design, technical leadership, and client-facing roles. While his German proficiency is basic (likely not meeting C1), his other qualifications strongly align with the role, and his strategic and analytical thinking is evident.
strengths: Extensive senior-level experience in software development and IT architecture with leadership roles
Strong open-source engagement and expertise in Linux/Unix environments (e.g., GISCollective, DLang projects)
Proven ability to mentor teams and drive technical strategy (e.g., AI-agent infrastructure, TDD practices)
concerns: German language proficiency is basic (not C1 as required)
Limited direct experience with UML modeling and requirements management mentioned in resume
No explicit mention of IT security, risk management, or compliance in work history
